ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the model */,
  "trained_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, number of trees) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., float, integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for training the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) of the model */,
  "r_square" REAL /* R-square value of the model */,
  "pcc" REAL /* Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve (AUC) of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., CSV, JSON, database) */,
  "size_in_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the data in megabytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_data_sources" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Specific data requested by the user (e.g., performance metrics, hyperparameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
